FlavourText.original:
The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.
FlavourText.zh_cn:
瓦尔帝国建立在无数人的血汗之上，
为之付出的人们如今却已化为尘埃。
FlavourText.zh_tw:
瓦爾人以奴隸跳動的心臟獻祭，
以眾多抽搐的死者砌成屍山血海。

group.original: Non-[Channelling|Channelling] [Spells|Spells] cost an additional {0}% of your maximum Life

translation.zh_cn: 非[Channelling|持续吟唱][Spells|法术]额外消耗 {0}% 的生命上限
translation.zh_tw: 非[Channelling|引導][Spells|法術]額外消耗你的 {0}% 最大生命

group.original: Non-[Channelling|Channelling] [Spells|Spells] have {0}% increased [Critical Hit Chance|Critical Hit Chance] per {1} maximum Life

translation.zh_cn: 每 {1} 生命上限使非[Channelling|吟唱][Spells|法术]的[Critical Hit Chance|暴击率]提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 每 {1} 最大生命，增加 {0}% 非[Channelling|引導][Spells|法術]的[Critical Hit Chance|暴擊率]

group.original: Non-[Channelling|Channelling] [Spells|Spells] deal {0}% increased Damage per {1} maximum Life

translation.zh_cn: 每 {1} 生命上限使非[Channelling|吟唱][Spells|法术]的伤害提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 每 {1} 最大生命，增加 {0}% 非[Channelling|引導][Spells|法術]的傷害

group.original: Non-[Channelling|Channelling] [Spells|Spells] have {0}% increased [Magnitude|Magnitude] of [Ailments|Ailments] per {1} maximum Life

translation.zh_cn: 每 {1} 点生命上限使非[Channelling|吟唱][Spells|法术]的[Ailments|异常状态][Magnitude|强度]提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 每 {1} 最大生命，增加 {0}% 非[Channelling|引導][Spells|法術]的[Ailments|異常狀態][Magnitude|幅度]

group.original: Non-[Channelling|Channelling] [Spells|Spells] have {0}% increased [Critical Hit Chance|Critical Hit Chance] per {1} maximum Mana

translation.zh_cn: 每 {1} 点魔力上限使非[Channelling|吟唱][Spells|法术]的[Critical Hit Chance|暴击几率]提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 每 {1} 最大魔力，增加 {0}% 非[Channelling|引導][Spells|法術]的[Critical Hit Chance|暴擊率]

translation.zh_tw: 每 {1} 最大魔力，增加 {0}% 非[Channelling|引導][Spells|法術]的傷害
